category_sources: Official Prowler repository describes an open-source cloud security platform for security and compliance across cloud environments.
source_facts.description says Prowler is for cloud security assessments, audits, incident response, and more.
display_name_sources: Official Prowler site and repository use the display name Prowler.
docs_sources: Official Prowler CLI basic usage page documents command-line operation.
Official docs.prowler.com is the dedicated Prowler documentation domain.
Official prowler-cloud/prowler README is the source repository documentation entry point.
repo_sources: Official Prowler README identifies the project and matches source_facts.homepage.
source_facts.repo is empty; official Prowler GitHub organization lists prowler-cloud/prowler as the public open-source repository.
tags_sources: Official Prowler repository describes security checks, compliance frameworks, and cloud security automation.
source_facts.description lists cloud security assessments, audits, and incident response.
